name: pending-stub
description: kind cluster bootstrap scaffolding, contract validator expansion, and code-quality HA hardening. Clears the critical path to HA validation chain.
sprintGoal: Establish the kind cluster bootstrap foundation (KIND-001a) to unlock the HA validation chain, harden SonarQube/ReportPortal charts to HA standard, and expand the contract validator test corpus.

stories.title: kind bootstrap: cluster/kind/bootstrap.sh + 3-node cluster + contract/validate.py
stories.description: Split of KIND-001 (achievable=3). Deliver only the cluster scaffolding half: write cluster/kind/bootstrap.sh that creates a 3-node kind cluster named sovereign-test and emits cluster-values.yaml; write contract/validate.py that validates cluster-values.yaml against contract/v1/cluster.schema.yaml. No platform components (Cilium, cert-manager, etc.) — those are KIND-001b.
acceptanceCriteria: ./cluster/kind/bootstrap.sh runs without error: kind get clusters shows sovereign-test
kubectl get nodes --context kind-sovereign-test shows 3 nodes all Ready
cluster-values.yaml is emitted and python3 contract/validate.py cluster-values.yaml exits 0 with output containing 'CONTRACT VALID'
stories.returnedReason: Split from KIND-001 (achievable=3 — too many integration points for one story)
stories.testPlan: shellcheck -S error cluster/kind/bootstrap.sh; ./cluster/kind/bootstrap.sh --dry-run; ./cluster/kind/bootstrap.sh; kind get clusters; kubectl get nodes --context kind-sovereign-test; python3 contract/validate.py cluster-values.yaml — show all output verbatim.

smart.notes: Focused split: cluster scaffolding only. No platform components in scope.

stories.title: SonarQube and ReportPortal Helm charts pass HA gate: replicaCount>=2, PDB, podAntiAffinity
stories.description: Harden the SonarQube and ReportPortal Helm charts to meet the platform HA standard. Both charts must have: replicaCount defaulting to 2, a PodDisruptionBudget with minAvailable=1, and podAntiAffinity preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution on hostname. Run the HA gate script against both charts to confirm.
acceptanceCriteria: helm template platform/charts/sonarqube/ | grep -c PodDisruptionBudget returns 1
helm template platform/charts/sonarqube/ | grep -c podAntiAffinity returns at least 1
helm template platform/charts/reportportal/ | grep -c PodDisruptionBudget returns 1
helm template platform/charts/reportportal/ | grep -c podAntiAffinity returns at least 1
stories.testPlan: helm lint platform/charts/sonarqube/; helm lint platform/charts/reportportal/; helm template platform/charts/sonarqube/ | grep PodDisruptionBudget; helm template platform/charts/reportportal/ | grep PodDisruptionBudget; show all output verbatim.

stories.title: Kaizen: Expand contract validator test corpus — cover imageRegistry and storageClass invariants
stories.description: contract/validate.py currently has only 2 test fixtures: valid.yaml and invalid-egress-not-blocked.yaml. The validator likely accepts contracts missing imageRegistry or storageClass invariants — there are no test cases to prove otherwise. Add at least 2 more invalid fixtures and verify the validator catches them.
acceptanceCriteria: contract/v1/tests/invalid-no-imageregistry.yaml exists and fails validate.py with a message referencing imageRegistry
contract/v1/tests/invalid-no-storageclass.yaml exists and fails validate.py with a message referencing storageClass

G7 gate passes: bash -c 'python3 contract/validate.py contract/v1/tests/valid.yaml > /dev/null 2>&1 && python3 contract/validate.py contract/v1/tests/invalid-egress-not-blocked.yaml > /dev/null 2>&1 && exit 1 || exit 0' (invalid rejected)
stories.testPlan: Run validate.py against each new fixture and verify exit code and error message. Show output verbatim.

stories.title: Kaizen: Fix docs developer on-ramp — update paths from bootstrap/ and kind/setup.sh to new monorepo structure
stories.description: The monorepo restructure (increment 17) moved kind setup from kind/setup.sh to cluster/kind/bootstrap.sh and charts from charts/ to platform/charts/. Any documentation referencing old paths gives developers incorrect instructions. Scan docs/ and README.md for stale references and update them.
acceptanceCriteria: grep -r 'kind/setup.sh' docs/ README.md returns no matches
grep -r 'bootstrap/providers' docs/ README.md returns no matches
docs/quickstart.md references cluster/kind/bootstrap.sh as the local setup command
stories.testPlan: Run grep checks above. Show output verbatim.
